questionHtml:
Which characteristic of the subclavian vein distinguishes it from the subclavian artery?

A.  Larger lumen

B.  Absence of valves

C.  Presence of pores

D.  Two layers of muscle

meta.title: Which characteristic of the subclavian vein distinguishes it from the subclavian artery? A. Larger lumen B. Absence of valves C. Presence of pores D. Two layers of muscle
